creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
2014-03-01 11:00 GMT+01:00 Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>: > The following reply was made to PR ports/187145; it has been noted by > GNATS. > > From: Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> > To: "bug-followup@FreeBSD.org" > Cc: > Subject: Re: ports/187145: net-mgmt/netxms : unexpire, update to 1.2.12, > cleanups > Date: Sat, 1 Mar 2014 15:59:08 +0600 > > --089e01176b1dfda5a404f3889a11 > Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8 > > Hi, > > Do you have Poudriere, Tinderbox or Redports log for all the supported > versions? > > It builds fine here with all options enabled, but with (e.g.) the default options the pkg-plist is wrong, see http://people.freebsd.org/~rene/netxms-1.2.12.log The solution is to make those files conditional on the correct option, can you take care of this? Regards, René > On Fri, Feb 28, 2014 at 9:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis > wrote: > > > Maintainer of net-mgmt/netxms, > > > > Please note that PR ports/187145 has just been submitted. > > > > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix > > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch > > and a committer will take care of it. > > > > The full text of the PR can be found at: > > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/187145 > > > > -- > > Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool > > edwin@FreeBSD.org > > > > --089e01176b1dfda5a404f3889a11 > Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8 > Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable > >
